howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to stress-free dinners, every week.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Set your dietary needs, budget, household size, and any allergies. We remember so you don't have to.
howItWorks.step2Desc: AI generates a personalized meal plan with recipes and a consolidated grocery list, delivered by email.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Follow simple, clear recipes. No stress, no waste, no wondering what's for dinner.

faq.title: Questions & Answers
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before getting started.
faq.a1: Fill out a quick profile with your dietary preferences, household size, and budget. You'll get a free 1-day meal plan immediately — no credit card required. Love it? Subscribe for full 7-day plans every week.
faq.q2: Is the free plan really free?
faq.a2: Yes! You get a complete 1-day meal plan with recipes and a grocery list — completely free, no credit card needed. Subscribe to unlock full 7-day plans delivered weekly.
faq.q3: Can I customize for allergies and dietary restrictions?
faq.a3: Absolutely. You can specify any allergies, intolerances, or dietary preferences (vegetarian, vegan, gluten-free, keto, etc.) during onboarding. Every meal plan is tailored to your needs.
faq.q4: What if I don't like the plan?
faq.a4: You get up to 2 regenerations per week. If a plan doesn't feel right, just hit regenerate from your dashboard and we'll create a new one based on the same preferences.
faq.a5: Yes, no contracts or commitments. Cancel anytime from your dashboard and you'll retain access through the end of your billing period.
faq.q6: What kind of meals are included?
faq.a6: A wide variety of home-cooked meals — from quick 20-minute weeknight dinners to more involved weekend recipes. All plans include breakfast, lunch, and dinner with realistic prep times and common ingredients.
faq.q7: Is this just for one person?
faq.a7: Nope. During setup, you tell us your household size and we adjust portions and grocery quantities accordingly. Works for individuals, couples, or families.
